message:
test(proptest): expand error_codes, recorder_export, setup, tantivy_policy, voi, and pane_tiers suites

+552/-168 lines expanding six property test suites:

proptest_error_codes.rs (+50 lines):
- Property 29: format_plain is deterministic for all catalog entries
- Property 30: format_plain is non-empty for all catalog entries
- Property 31: list_codes_by_category results are sorted by code
- Property 32: list_error_codes is deterministic
- Property 33: from_code is deterministic for arbitrary code strings

proptest_recorder_export.rs (+413/-168 lines, major rewrite):
- Restructure test helpers and strategies for better composability
- Add export format stability: JSON export roundtrip preserves all fields
- Add export filtering: pane_id filter, time range filter, event type filter
- Add export pagination: offset/limit respects ordering
- Add export deduplication: duplicate event_ids are collapsed
- Add export integrity: content_hash stability across exports
- Add export streaming: chunked export produces identical output to bulk

proptest_setup.rs (+95 lines):
- Setup configuration validation: valid config passes all checks
- Setup default values are within documented ranges
- Setup directory creation is idempotent
- Setup config serde roundtrip preserves all fields
- Setup config merge: CLI args override file config override defaults
- Setup config validation rejects invalid combinations

proptest_tantivy_policy.rs (+90 lines):
- Policy index field configuration roundtrip
- Policy schema version compatibility
- Policy tokenizer configuration validation
- Policy merge precedence (field-level overrides)
- Policy default values for optional fields
- Policy serde stability across versions

proptest_voi.rs (+60/-60 lines, rewrite):
- Restructure VOI (Value of Information) property tests
- Add VOI computation determinism for fixed inputs
- Add VOI monotonicity: higher information gain → higher VOI score
- Add VOI boundary conditions: zero variance, single observation

proptest_pane_tiers.rs (+12/-12 lines):
- Fix import reordering from cargo fmt
- Adjust tier boundary assertions for updated tier thresholds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
